the overall scores are reasonable.\n\n4. **Justification for Risk Scores > 0.5:**\n   - None of the reports assign a risk higher than 0.5, which is appropriate.\n   - The code is a standard factory with no signs of vulnerabilities or malicious intent.\n\n**Conclusion:** No higher risk scores are justified.\n\n5. **Malware Score Reflection:**\n   - All reports correctly identify a malware score of 0.\n   - The code does not perform any malicious actions, data exfiltration, or obfuscation.\n\n**Conclusion:** Malware score is accurate.\n\n6. **Claims Based on Assumptions:**\n   - The reports do not make unwarranted assumptions; they base their conclusions on the static nature of the code and its standard patterns.\n   - No unfounded claims are present.\n\n7. **Consistency of Scores with the Reports:**\n   - The scores are consistent with the analysis.\n   - No discrepancies are observed.\n\n---\n\n### Final Assessment:\n\n**Overall Malware Score:** 0  \n**Obfuscated Score:** 0  \n**Risk Score:** 0 (or very close to 0, e.g., 0.1 for minor caution)\n\n**Justification:**  \nThe code is a typical, autogenerated ethers.js factory for an ERC20 token interface.
